# Support & community

- **Data corrections / sources:** [Open a data correction issue](https://github.com/OWNER/REPO/issues/new?template=data_correction.yml) *(replace OWNER/REPO after publish)*
- **Disputes / contested facts:** [Start a Discussion](https://github.com/OWNER/REPO/discussions) — use the *Dispute escalation* template when available
- **Bugs (map or CI):** [Bug report](https://github.com/OWNER/REPO/issues/new?template=bug_report.yml)
- **Maintainers:** see [`jem/docs/TEAM.md`](../jem/docs/TEAM.md) and [`GOVERNANCE.md`](GOVERNANCE.md)

This project does not provide legal advice. See the [README disclaimer](../README.md#disclaimer).
